message:
chore(beads): create hardening sweep bead tree from code audit findings

Create 30-bead dependency tree from comprehensive code audit:

P0 CRITICAL (2 tasks):
- DocuSign: remove demo.docusign.net default URL
- Plaid: remove sandbox.plaid.com default URL

P1 HIGH (5 tasks + 2 epics):
- AWS+S3: implement SigV4 or gate with error
- GCP: implement JWT signing or gate with error
- Anthropic: update frozen API_VERSION 2023-06-01
- Placeholder implementations epic
- Frozen API versions epic

P2 MEDIUM (13 tasks + 3 epics):
- Manifest [timeouts] schema + per-connector timeout sweep
- Infrastructure crate env-overridable configs (streaming, webhook, telemetry)
- Manifest status field (ready/stub/deprecated)
- Notion, Azure, Salesforce API version updates
- DocuSign streaming, LLM-Router routing placeholders

P3 LOW (5 tasks):
- Connector implementations (firecrawl, huggingface, perplexity-search)
- fwc benchmark stubs, history/replay config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
